title: Heavy Weight 2.5k+ Bolton Twill Professional Tough Quality Dust Sheet 12ft x 9ft (5 x 9ft)
features: ✅ Heavy Duty Protection: Thick, tightly woven cotton guards furniture, floors, and carpets from paint, dust, and debris.
📏 Generous Sizes: Large coverage area of 5ft x 9ft to 15 x 18ft 12ft x 9ft – perfect for home decorating, DIY projects, and renovations.
♻️ Reusable & Eco-Friendly: Durable and washable – an environmentally friendly alternative to single-use plastic sheeting.
🔧 Multi-Purpose Use: Ideal for painting, decorating, sanding, building work, or protecting items in storage. Suitable for indoor and outdoor jobs.
📦 Easy to Store: Lightweight enough to fold away neatly for compact, tidy storage between uses.
description: Protect your home and workspace with this Heavy Duty Cotton Dust Sheet. Made from robust cotton twill, it provides excellent coverage and helps prevent damage from paint, plaster, or dust during renovations and DIY projects. With its generous size of 12ft x 9ft (3.6m x 2.7m), it’s perfect for covering furniture, carpets, and floors. The sheet is washable and reusable, offering an eco-friendly alternative to disposable plastic sheets. Whether you’re redecorating a room, sanding furniture, or storing items in the loft, this durable dust sheet makes the job cleaner and easier. Buy with confidence and keep your space protected with our premium heavy duty dust sheet!
